official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound set_border_lerp_size fixture.
Official binary source for the old size/new size/lerp time body codec.

field_notes.old_size: Primitive border size fixture; does not prove interpolation runtime behavior.
field_notes.new_size: Primitive border target size fixture; does not prove interpolation runtime behavior.
field_notes.lerp_time: Primitive lerp time fixture encoded as a VarLong by the official codec.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_border_lerp_size packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive lerp fixture only; do not infer world-border interpolation behavior, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
